item.title: About Me
item.description: I am a Postdoctoral Research Associate at University of Exeter on the Horizon2020 project ‘Integrating Diversity in the European Union.

item.title: Academic Publications
item.description: Kröger, S., M. Lorimer, and R. Bellamy. (2021) ‘The democratic dilemmas of differentiated integration’, Swiss Political Science Review, DOI 10.

item.title: Education
item.description: 2015-2019 PhD in European Studies, European Institute, London School of Economics.

item.title: Public Engagement
item.description: Blog Posts ‘Europe as ideological resource: How far right parties can benefit from European integration’, Blog Post, LSE European Public Policy and Politics Blog (May 2020)

item.title: Teaching
item.description: Policy Making in the European Union EU421 - LSE European Institute
